instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prioritize fuel efficiency in Eco mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger early upshift when Driving_Mode equals Eco.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode = Eco THEN Upshift_RPM = Eco_Upshift_RPM
IF Driving_Mode = Eco AND Engine_Speed > Eco_Upshift_RPM THEN Trigger_Upshift
IF Driving_Mode = Eco AND Throttle_Position < Economy_Throttle THEN Trigger_Early_Upshift
IF Driving_Mode = Eco AND Mode_Signal_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Normal_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall provide balanced shift behavior in Normal mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall apply standard shift logic when Driving_Mode equals Normal.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode = Normal THEN Shift_Strategy = Standard
IF Driving_Mode = Normal AND Engine_Speed > Normal_Upshift_RPM THEN Trigger_Upshift
IF Driving_Mode = Normal AND Engine_Speed < Normal_Downshift_RPM THEN Trigger_Downshift
IF Mode_Signal_Fault = TRUE THEN Default_Driving_Mode = Normal

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall provide aggressive shifting in Sport mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay upshift when Driving_Mode equals Sport.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode = Sport THEN Upshift_RPM = Sport_Upshift_RPM
IF Driving_Mode = Sport AND Engine_Speed > Sport_Upshift_RPM THEN Trigger_Upshift
IF Driving_Mode = Sport AND Throttle_Position > Sport_Throttle THEN Trigger_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent mode switching during gear engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject driving mode change when Gear_Shift_In_Progress equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Mode_Change_Request = TRUE AND Gear_Shift_In_Progress = TRUE THEN Reject_Mode_Change

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate sport shifting during high throttle demand.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall switch to Sport shifting when Throttle_Position exceeds Performance_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Performance_Threshold THEN Driving_Mode = Sport
IF Driving_Mode = Sport AND Engine_Speed < Max_RPM THEN Maintain_LowGear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall revert to Normal mode when mode signal becomes invalid.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall switch to Normal mode when Driving_Mode_Signal_Valid equals FALSE.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode_Signal_Valid = FALSE THEN Driving_Mode = Normal
IF Driving_Mode_Signal_Valid = FALSE AND Mode_Change_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Mode_Change

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall reduce engine load in Eco mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall prioritize early upshift and reduced torque when Driving_Mode equals Eco.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode = Eco AND Engine_Speed > Eco_Upshift_RPM THEN Trigger_Upshift
IF Driving_Mode = Eco AND Throttle_Position < Economy_Throttle THEN Maintain_HighGear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain gear during sport acceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit upshift during rapid acceleration in Sport mode.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode = Sport AND Throttle_Rate > Acceleration_Limit THEN Inhibit_Upshift
IF Driving_Mode = Sport AND Throttle_Rate <= Acceleration_Limit THEN Evaluate_Shift
IF Driving_Mode = Sport AND Engine_Speed < Max_RPM THEN Maintain_LowGear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable adaptive shift behavior based on driving mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall adjust shift thresholds based on Driving_Mode.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restrict gear shifting during invalid driving mode states.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shifting when Driving_Mode equals Unknown.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode = Unknown THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Driving_Mode != Unknown THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Driving_Mode = Unknown AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate aggressive downshift during Sport mode braking.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Driving_Mode equals Sport and Brake_Pedal_Status equals Pressed.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode = Sport AND Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed THEN Trigger_Downshift
IF Driving_Mode = Sport AND Brake_Pedal_Status = Released THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Driving_Mode = Sport AND Engine_Speed < Max_RPM THEN Enable_Aggressive_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent aggressive shifting in Eco mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit kickdown when Driving_Mode equals Eco.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode = Eco AND Kickdown_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Kickdown

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall adjust shift thresholds dynamically based on selected mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall update shift parameters when Driving_Mode changes.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable sport shifting during transmission faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall revert to Normal shifting when Transmission_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Fault = TRUE THEN Driving_Mode = Normal
IF Transmission_Fault = TRUE AND Driving_Mode = Sport THEN Disable_Performance_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow mode switching only when vehicle speed is within safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit driving mode change when Vehicle_Speed is below Mode_Switch_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed >= Mode_Switch_Speed AND Mode_Change_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Mode_Change
